notes: The Box-Set also features a Deluxe Booklet including imagery from The Slow Rush photoshoot & opening notes, as well as The Slow Rush 2050 Calendar.

videos.title: Tame Impala - The Slow Rush CD Unboxing
videos.description:
In this video I show you the The Slow Rush CD by Tame Impala.
I unbox the product completely for you and show you every content in detail.
► You can buy the album here:
CD: https://amzn.to/40zcKzW
Vinyl: https://amzn.to/3Vn4u5j
Digital: https://amzn.to/3H
